title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.
summary_public: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce
